'''ân-t-r-v''' ('''kanatrevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chandelle|chandelle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chandelle|chandelle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-t-r-v
|-
! Lemma
| kanatrevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinatrevoko|thinatrevoko]] || [[word:jinatrevoko|jinatrevoko]] || [[word:shinatrevoko|shinatrevoko]] || [[word:kinatrevoko|kinatrevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunatrevoko|thuthunatrevoko]] || [[word:jujunatrevoko|jujunatrevoko]] || [[word:shushunatrevoko|shushunatrevoko]] || [[word:kukunatrevoko|kukunatrevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunatrevoko|thunatrevoko]] || [[word:junatrevoko|junatrevoko]] || [[word:shunatrevoko|shunatrevoko]] || [[word:kunatrevoko|kunatrevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunatrevoko|thunatrevoko]] || [[word:junatrevoko|junatrevoko]] || [[word:shunatrevoko|shunatrevoko]] || [[word:kunatrevoko|kunatrevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonatrevoko|thothonatrevoko]] || [[word:jojonatrevoko|jojonatrevoko]] || [[word:shoshonatrevoko|shoshonatrevoko]] || [[word:kokonatrevoko|kokonatrevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonatrevoko|thonatrevoko]] || [[word:jonatrevoko|jonatrevoko]] || [[word:shonatrevoko|shonatrevoko]] || [[word:konatrevoko|konatrevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonatrevoko|thonatrevoko]] || [[word:jonatrevoko|jonatrevoko]] || [[word:shonatrevoko|shonatrevoko]] || [[word:konatrevoko|konatrevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnatrevoko|thĂŠnatrevoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnatrevoko|jĂŠnatrevoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnatrevoko|shĂŠnatrevoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnatrevoko|kĂŠnatrevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanatrevoko|thathanatrevoko]] || [[word:jajanatrevoko|jajanatrevoko]] || [[word:shashanatrevoko|shashanatrevoko]] || [[word:kakanatrevoko|kakanatrevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanatrevoko|thanatrevoko]] || [[word:janatrevoko|janatrevoko]] || [[word:shanatrevoko|shanatrevoko]] || [[word:kanatrevoko|kanatrevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanatrevoko|thanatrevoko]] || [[word:janatrevoko|janatrevoko]] || [[word:shanatrevoko|shanatrevoko]] || [[word:kanatrevoko|kanatrevoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
